experience_focus: Validated ETL workflows and built reusable data quality checks across claims, member, provider, and payer-operations data.
Translated mapping documents and business rules into standardized validation frameworks used across the QA team.
Contributed to stakeholder trust in dashboards and downstream KPIs by reducing post-release hotfixes and improving reporting accuracy.
Investigated production issues end-to-end and documented defects, test evidence, and resolution details in Agile workflows.
Worked across QA, engineering, and business teams to support release readiness and data quality outcomes.
gaps: Role is more client-facing and Power BI-forward than the resume currently shows explicitly
Hybrid location in Illinois may limit fit if remote-only is preferred
strengths: Strong SQL and validation framework experience
summary: Healthcare data and ETL analyst with 7+ years of experience improving data quality, validating enterprise data flows, and translating business rules into repeatable testing and reporting controls. Best aligned to roles that need healthcare domain fluency, SQL validation, reporting accuracy, and scalable analytics support.
headline: Senior Healthcare Data Quality Analyst | SQL | Reporting Quality | Payer Data
notes: Good role, but less direct than Veeva because the posting leans on customer-facing analytics and dashboard ownership. Tailor toward reporting quality, standardized analytics support, and healthcare domain depth.
job_description:
# Sr. Healthcare Data Quality Analyst
Company: IMO Health
Source date checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://jobs.lever.co/imo-online/6c199cf6-c667-49b8-8535-ae87fb25534d

## Why it fits
- Healthcare data quality role with SQL and reporting overlap.
- Values analytics documentation, dashboard support, and data quality insight.
- Seeks professionals who can translate complex healthcare data into clear outputs.

## Key requirements from the posting
- Support repeatable data and analytics requests.
- Build and maintain Power BI dashboards.
- Deliver customer-success reporting.
- Improve analytics automation and process documentation.
- Bring 5+ years in healthcare analytics or reporting.
